APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Oct-04-2013 Continued To Oct-22-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFFS SALOME LUIS, REBECCA DARANG, NANCY ZAFRA AND ELEZAR CUERVAS APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is continued to October 22, 2013. The Court has the moving and opposing papers. The Court also received the reply brief filed on October 2, 2013. The Court did not receive a courtesy copy of plaintiff's supplemental filings of September 24, 2013. The Court only has a copy of defendant's objection to those filings. Plaintiff shall comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and lodge a courtesy copy of those filings by October 10, 2013, with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/PJB)
